items.title: Privileged File System Vulnerability Present in a SCADA System
items.author: Asher Davila and Malav Vyas
items.content: We detail our discovery of CVE-2025-0921. This privileged file system flaw in SCADA system Iconics Suite could lead to a denial-of-service (DoS) attack.

items.title: Google Presentations Abused for Phishing, (Fri, Jan 30th)
items.content: <article>Charlie, one of our readers, has forwarded an interesting phishing email. The email was sent to users of the Vivladi Webmail service. While not overly convincing, the email is likely sufficient to trick a non-empty group of users:</article>

items.title: ISC Stormcast For Friday, January 30th, 2026 https://isc.sans.edu/podcastdetail/9788, (Fri, Jan 30th)
Understanding the Russian Cyber Threat to the 2026 Winter Olympics
items.author: Justin Moore
items.content: Russia's current isolation from the Olympics may lead to increased cyber threats targeting the 2026 Winter Games. We discuss the potential threat picture.
